name: Meta Ads — Daily Snapshot (all brands)
_comment: SETUP: (1) Create Meta System User in Business Manager. (2) Generate long-lived access token with ads_read permission. (3) Set META_ACCESS_TOKEN env var. (4) Replace all act_REPLACE_* placeholders with actual ad account IDs. (5) Set SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.
